kicker: MT LEVEL II // LEVEL I REVIEW

beats.narration: Welcome to Level Two magnetic particle testing. Before new technique work, one fast lap around Level One — every call you'll make stands on these basics.

payload.title: THE LEVEL I LAP
payload.sub: Every Level II call stands on these basics.

beats.narration: The lap has three stations: the principles inside the steel, the process every test follows, and the equipment you must know on sight.
First, the hysteresis loop. Cut the magnetizing force and retentivity remains. Hard steels keep it and allow the residual method — soft steels demand continuous.

payload.heading: The loop that picks your method

beats.narration: Next, the pairing: circular fields find longitudinal flaws; longitudinal fields find transverse. Full coverage is always two magnetizations, roughly perpendicular.

payload.heading: Match the field to the flaw

beats.narration: Before every shot, three questions: direction, strength, proof. If any answer is no, the shot is decoration — not inspection.

payload.sub: If any answer is no, it's decoration — not inspection.
